body:
Thanks for the follow-up, Chloe — I've had a chance to dig into the updated deck and I'm genuinely impressed by the traction [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co) has shown in Q3, particularly the enterprise pipeline numbers. The methodology you've built around real-time emissions reconciliation is exactly the kind of infrastructure layer I think the market has been missing, and it maps well to what we've been tracking at [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) on the climate data stack. I'd love to move this forward with a deeper technical session — would you be open to looping in your CTO for a call in the next two weeks? In the meantime, if you can share the updated cap table and any LOIs you're working through, that would help me get our investment committee aligned ahead of any formal conversation. Looking forward to the next step.

Amara
